page.title: Agent Hub
page.subtitle: Create, configure, and manage multiple agents. Each Agent can independently bind a persona, prompt orchestration, tool authorization, and context policy.

editor.agentIdHint: Unique identifier, e.g. 'my.assistant' (cannot change after creation)
editor.name: Display Name
editor.nameHint: The display name for this Agent
editor.tagsHint: Press Enter to add tags (e.g. entertainment, productivity, developer)
editor.personaHint: Select an existing persona. The Agent will inherit its identity and conversation style.
editor.contextPolicyHint: Controls how conversation history is trimmed
editor.toolsHint: Select tools this Agent can use
editor.skillsHint: Select skills this Agent can use
editor.promptOrchestrationHint: Select and arrange prompt fragments for this Agent, grouped by the 7 pipeline stages
editor.capabilitiesHint: Enable extended capabilities for this Agent. These settings override global defaults.

knowledgebase.title: Knowledge Base
knowledgebase.enableHint: When enabled, the Agent can retrieve information from specified knowledge bases
knowledgebase.namesHint: Enter a knowledge base name and press Enter to add
knowledgebase.fusionTopKHint: Number of results returned after fusing results from multiple knowledge bases
knowledgebase.finalTopKHint: Number of results retrieved from the knowledge base. Higher values may provide more information but can introduce noise
knowledgebase.agenticModeHint: When enabled, knowledge base retrieval becomes an LLM Tool, allowing the model to decide autonomously when to query

websearch.title: Web Search
websearch.enableHint: When enabled, the Agent can search the internet for up-to-date information
websearch.keyHint: Multiple keys can be added for rotation
websearch.baiduKey: Baidu Qianfan APP Builder API Key

computerUse.title: Computer Use
computerUse.runtimeHint: sandbox = isolated sandbox, local = local machine, none = disabled
computerUse.requireAdminHint: When enabled, AstrBot admin permission is required to use computer capabilities
computerUse.neoTokenHint: Bay API Key (sk-bay-...). Leave empty for auto-discovery.

proactive.title: Proactive Capability
proactive.enableHint: When enabled, the Agent can autonomously trigger tasks at specified times for proactive interactions

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete agent "{id}"? This action cannot be undone.
messages.discardConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

empty.title: No Agents Yet
empty.subtitle: Create your first agent to get started

promptPicker.title: Select Prompts
promptPicker.subtitle: Choose prompt fragments from the registry to link to this Agent
